goal: presenter receives real uploaded texture boundary proof

methods: present(D3D11TextureHandle texture, int32_t width, int32_t height)
current_interface.responsibility: Receive uploaded texture and record first-frame proof

current_implementation.notes: Records timestamps and frame counts but does not actually present texture

current_test_coverage.reality_proof: Requires real D3D11 device context for texture tests

reality_proof_requirements.real_texture_boundary: Presenter must receive actual D3D11TextureHandle from real upload
reality_proof_requirements.real_presentation: Presenter must actually present texture (not just record timestamp)
reality_proof_requirements.real_first_frame_detection: First frame must be from actual texture presentation
reality_proof_requirements.real_frame_counter: Must increment only on real presentations
reality_proof_requirements.real_timestamps: First frame timestamp must be from real presentation
reality_proof_requirements.device_unavailable_handling: Must return BLOCKED_ENV when device unavailable

required_reality_tests: Real Texture Presentation Test: Present actual texture from real upload
Real First Frame Detection Test: Verify first frame from real presentation
Real Frame Counter Test: Verify frame counter increments on real presentations
Real Timestamp Test: Verify timestamps from real system clock
Device Unavailable Block Test: Verify BLOCKED_ENV when device unavailable
No Fake Presentation Test: Verify no simulation without real device
test_requirements: All tests must use real D3d11DeviceContext and D3d11TextureUpload
No mock textures or stub presentations
Tests must handle device unavailable scenario honestly
Evidence must prove real texture boundary, not just interface contract

inspector_snapshot_requirements.presenter_boundary_snapshot: initialization, texture_handle, presentation_result, first_frame_time, frame_count, device_availability

decision_ledger_requirements.presentation_decision: Input: texture, dimensions; Output: success, first_frame_time, frame_count

schema_gate_requirements.texture_handle_required: texture_handle must not be null for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.presentation_result_required: presentation_result must be true for RUNTIME_PASS
schema_gate_requirements.anti_fake_validation: no stub presentation or simulated texture

real_texture_boundary_proof: Real texture handle: D3D11TextureHandle passed to present()
Real dimensions: width/height match actual texture
Real first frame: from actual presentation
Real frame counter: increments on real presentations
forbidden_fake_proofs: timestamp without real presentation → insufficient proof
frame counter without real presentations → insufficient proof

workspace_requirements: No generated texture files in source root

classification_options: RUNTIME_PASS: Real texture presented with real device
CONTRACT_PASS: Interface contract proven but not runtime
FAIL: Required proof missing or conflicting
forbidden_claims: Never claim real presentation without real device
Never claim runtime PASS if BLOCKED_ENV
Never claim presentation verification without real verification
Never claim first frame without real presentation

reason: Presenter boundary reality audit planned. Current interface is stub implementation (CONTRACT_PASS). Real texture presentation with real D3D11 device required for RUNTIME_PASS. Device unavailable must result in BLOCKED_ENV.
